name: @tank/clean-code
description: Clean code patterns with smell detection and refactoring recipes. Covers naming, function design, code smells, refactoring patterns, complexity management, and SOLID principles. Triggers: clean code, refactor, code smell, naming, function design, SOLID, single responsibility, DRY, complexity, readability, maintainability, technical debt, code review, code quality, extract method, long method, magic number.
